message:
fix(tui): refactor SystemHealth text mode into structured styled sections (br-1xt0m.1.11.1)

Replace monolithic writeln!() text dump with styled Line/Span sections:
Configuration, Connection Diagnostics, and Findings. Level badges [OK],
[WARN], [FAIL] now use semantic colors (green/amber/red). HTTP status
codes show human-readable labels (401 Unauthorized, etc.). Section
dividers use styled headers. Remediation hints are visually distinct
with accent styling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
